category_sources: source_facts.description says portable OpenBSD vi for UNIX systems; official README describes OpenVi as a portable Berkeley vi/ex text editor.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title uses "OpenVi"; source_facts.homepage is the OpenVi repository.
docs_sources: Official OpenVi repository README contains overview, building, availability, versioning, history, and related documentation links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/johnsonjh/OpenVi, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists ovi/oex/oview; official README describes portable OpenBSD vi/ex for UNIX-like systems.
